---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Council OS SDKs
title: '[Bug] '
labels: bug
---

## SDK & Version

- Package: (e.g., `@council/sdk`, `council-sdk`, `@council/connector-sdk`)
- Version: (e.g., `1.0.0`)

## Environment

- Runtime: (e.g., Node.js 20.11.0, Python 3.11.5)
- OS: (e.g., macOS 14.2, Ubuntu 22.04)

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Install `...`
2. Run `...`
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or logs if available.

## Additional Context

Any other context, screenshots, or code snippets that might help.
